text: Stepping into these sleek, open spaces, I feel a sense of calm and anticipation. The sterile, almost futuristic ambiance quiets my mind, yet it invites curiosity—what ideas, what collaborations could emerge here? The bold wall of R+D fills me with intellectual excitement. I am both witness and participant in an unfolding experiment about humanity, technology, and innovation. There is a pleasant tension between emptiness and potential.
